name: Product Fruits Onboarding API
what_it_does: No-code product adoption platform with REST API — providing in-app product tours, onboarding checklists, tooltips, news feeds (Life Ring button), user feedback surveys, and NPS collection, with user segmentation and analytics to improve product onboarding and feature discovery.
use_cases: Querying onboarding tour completion rates for customer success health monitoring
Syncing user attributes and events to Product Fruits for personalized guide segmentation
Pulling NPS and feedback survey responses for voice-of-customer analysis pipelines
Triggering in-app announcements for new features via JavaScript API
Integrating Product Fruits engagement data with CRM for expansion revenue signals
not_for: Enterprise DAP with compliance and governance (use WalkMe or Whatfix)
Code-based interactive tutorials (use Shepherd.js or React Joyride)
Complex conditional logic onboarding requiring engineering involvement
best_when: A startup or SMB SaaS company wants affordable no-code in-app onboarding, news feed, NPS, and tours with all features in one platform at a low price point.
avoid_when: You need enterprise-grade DAP governance, complex A/B testing of flows, or deeply customized guide behavior requiring code.

auth.notes: API key from Product Fruits account. Bearer token auth. Workspace-scoped. JavaScript SDK for in-app guide initialization and user identification. Webhook for user events. No OAuth2 or scopes.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: up to 100 monthly active users
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter $79/month (1,500 MAU); Growth $139/month (5,000 MAU); Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Czech company (Prague). Founded 2019. Raised seed funding. All-in-one: tours, checklists, tooltips, news feed (Life Ring), NPS, surveys, hints. Most affordable full-featured onboarding tool. Strong SMB and startup adoption. MAU-based pricing makes it scalable. Chrome extension for no-code visual builder.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for users, tours, checklists, NPS, and events. Bearer token auth. JavaScript SDK for in-app rendering. Webhook for user events (tour complete, NPS response). Moderate documentation. Guide creation is UI-driven — API for data and user management. Czech company with EU-first approach.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: User reads idempotent. Tour completion reads idempotent. NPS response reads idempotent. User attribute updates idempotent by user ID.
known_agent_gotchas: JavaScript SDK required for in-app guide rendering — REST API alone is data-only
User identification via JS SDK sets context for segmentation
Guides are created in visual builder — API cannot create content programmatically
MAU-based pricing — count active users to estimate plan requirements
EU-hosted platform — GDPR compliance built-in, US data residency not available

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. EU data residency (Czech Republic). Bearer token auth. JavaScript SDK injects into product — verify CSP compatibility. User behavior data is PII — implement consent management before SDK init. Czech company with strong EU data protection practices.
